subject: how are we doing and what are my issues meeting?

emails.subject: RE: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.subject_base: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.body: Please note this meeting has been scheduled for Tuesday, October 31, 2001 in EB49C2 from 8:30 11:00 AM. For Omaha participants this meeting will be in OMA7C2. Thank You, Kathy Campos

emails.subject: FW: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.subject_base: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.body: FW: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting? Please note this meeting has been scheduled for Tuesday, October 30, 2001. Sorry for the confusion. Thank You, Kathy Campos

emails.subject: FW: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.subject_base: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.body: FW: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting? Sorry for the confusion, the meeting is WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 31, 2001 not Tuesday. Thank You, Kathy Campos

emails.subject: RE: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.subject_base: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting?
emails.body: RE: How are we doing and what are my issues meeting? The meeting will at the most last a little more than an hour or 2. Nothing special to prepare for.
